title: Add Processing Time Notice to Step 3 of Metrics Analyst
story: As a DataTools Pro user waiting for Step 3 to complete, I want to see a notice about expected processing time, so that I know the system is working and don't think it's hung.
description:
Users reported thinking the system was hanging during Step 3 processing. Add a static notice message below the existing processing spinner:

'NOTICE: This batch process takes about 1 minute per dashboard.'

This notice remains visible for the duration of Step 3. The existing rotating notice messages continue cycling every 6 seconds above it.
acceptance_criteria: A static notice appears during Step 3: 'NOTICE: This batch process takes about 1 minute per dashboard.'
The notice is shown in addition to the existing rotating messages
The static notice only appears during Step 3 processing
ux_changes: Added a persistent time-estimate notice during Step 3 processing alongside the existing rotating notice messages.
implementation_notes: Two notice messages are now shown during Step 3: the first rotates every 6 seconds, the second is static with the time estimate.
comment_summary: Developer added the static notice for Step 3 only. The first notice rotates every 6 seconds while the second remains fixed.
